date.description: Day and date of the record, e.g., 'Thu, Oct 30'

punch_in_time.description: Time when the user punched in, or 'NA' if absent

punch_in_out.description: Time when the user punched out, or 'NA' if absent

total_hour.description: Total hours worked in HH:MM format or '0' if none

is_positive_hour.description: Indicates whether total hours meet the positive threshold

leave_type.description: Type of leave if applicable, otherwise null

punch_in_time_org.description: Original punch-in time before modification, if any

punch_in_out_org.description: Original punch-out time before modification, if any
